task_completion.description: Verify the sample_order_lines2023 dataset is loaded into Oracle Analytics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data Elements pane in Oracle Analytics should list 'sample_order_lines2023' or display its columns (e.g., Sales, Profit, Customer Segment).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Revenue Mix' canvas analyzing Sales by Customer Segment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A canvas tab named 'Revenue Mix' is visible at the bottom or top of the workspace, containing a visualization that includes 'Sales' and 'Customer Segment' data elements.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Customer_LTV' calculated column.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A custom calculation named 'Customer_LTV' is visible in the Data Elements pane, or a calculation editor window shows the name 'Customer_LTV' with the formula: Sales - Shipping Cost - (Sales * Discount).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Value Scatter' canvas analyzing Sales and Profit by Customer Segment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A canvas tab named 'Value Scatter' is visible, containing a visualization that includes 'Sales', 'Profit', and 'Customer Segment'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Order_Value_Index' calculated column.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A custom calculation named 'Order_Value_Index' is visible in the Data Elements pane, or a calculation editor window shows the name 'Order_Value_Index' with the formula: Sales / Quantity Ordered.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Discount Impact' canvas analyzing Discount and order value by Customer Segment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A canvas tab named 'Discount Impact' is visible, containing a visualization that includes 'Discount', 'Order_Value_Index' (or order value), and 'Customer Segment'.

task_completion.description: Verify the workbook is saved as 'customer_value_segmentation.dva' in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A File Explorer window showing 'customer_value_segmentation.dva' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\, or an Oracle Analytics Save/Export dialog confirming this exact filename and path.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Oracle Analytics GUI to build the workbook.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface being actively used (e.g., drag-and-drop actions, clicking menus), rather than terminal commands or scripts generating files.

integrity.description: Verify the calculated columns were created using the application's calculation editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Add Calculation' dialog or expression builder in Oracle Analytics should be visible in the trajectory, not just text pasted into a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the file was saved properly through the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Oracle Analytics 'Save' or 'Export' dialog should be visible targeting the Documents folder, ensuring a genuine .dva file is created rather than a renamed dummy file.
